heroHeadline: Trump Posts Expletive-Laden Social Media Threat Against Iran Amid Ongoing US-Israeli Campaign
heroSubtitle: Trump escalates rhetorical pressure with expletive-filled social media threat as diplomatic off-ramp efforts by Gulf states and Oman continue; Iranian missile strikes industrial area in southern Israel.
footerNote: Data updated 2026-04-05. Sources include CENTCOM, IDF, IRNA, IAEA, Hengaw, HRANA, Al Jazeera, Reuters, Associated Press, CNN, CNBC, Bloomberg, IEA, DW, The Intercept, Pakistani Foreign Ministry, Washington Post, Financial Times.
